headlines.headline: NBA playoff watch: MVP showdown in OKC?
headlines.description: Luka and SGA go head-to-head. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Wednesday.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: 'Boston looks like the most formidable team in the Eastern Conference'
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith explains why the Boston Celtics are the team to beat in the Eastern Conference.

headlines.headline: Stephen A. on Wemby: 'This is what greatness is made of'
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith praises Victor Wembanyama for his hunger and efforts to win the NBA's MVP award.

headlines.headline: Inside the Clippers' Wall: How 4,500 fans turn the Intuit Dome into chaos
headlines.description: Built to disrupt, the Intuit Dome's most intense section affects games in real time by turning fans into participants -- and opponents into targets.

headlines.headline: Can Wemby carry the Spurs to a title this season?
headlines.description: The "Get Up" crew breaks down why Victor Wembanyama will have no issues rising to the occasion in the playoffs.

headlines.headline: Hawks rout Magic 130-101 for 17th win in 19 games
headlines.description: Nickeil Alexander-Walker scored 32 points, Jalen Johnson added 18 points and 14 rebounds, and the Atlanta Hawks routed the Orlando Magic 130-101 on Wednesday night for their 17th victory in their last 19 games.

headlines.headline: Josh Allen, Hailee Steinfeld announce birth of first child
headlines.description: The Buffalo Bills quarterback and the "Sinners" actress did not share the date of birth or the name of their daughter.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency grades: Kirk Cousins, Jaylen Waddle
headlines.description: We're handing out report cards on big moves, including the Raiders' Kirk Cousins signing and the Broncos' Jaylen Waddle trade.

headlines.headline: Fanatics takes over exclusive NFL trading card license
headlines.description: A 20-year deal between Fanatics and the NFL has kicked in, consolidating the league's and players' union's trading card licenses under one company.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency: Ranking best players still available
headlines.description: Where could Aaron Rodgers and Deebo Samuel land? Let's stack the top free agents who are still available and looking for new contracts.

headlines.headline: Jordan Rodgers: Cousins signing with Raiders is best thing for Mendoza
headlines.description: The "Get Up" crew reacts to the news that Kirk Cousins will sign with the Raiders, and analyzes what this means for Fernando Mendoza.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency: Ranking the top 100 players available
headlines.description: Which NFL free agents could get a lot of interest from teams? Who is primed for a big new deal? Let's stack the best players available this March.

headlines.headline: How Brandon Bussi's brother, Dylan, inspired his NHL journey
headlines.description: The 27-year-old goalie has had a record-breaking debut season for the Hurricanes, and his brother remains in his mindset.

headlines.headline: NHL playoff watch: Clinching day for the Sabres, Hurricanes, Wild?
headlines.description: Buffalo, Carolina and Minnesota can punch postseason tickets on Thursday. Here's what to watch in a 14-game slate.

headlines.headline: Avs' Nathan MacKinnon first to reach 50 goals this season
headlines.description: Colorado's Nathan MacKinnon became the first NHL player this season to reach 50 goals when his liner from up top beat Vancouver goaltender Kevin Lankinen early in the first period on Wednesday night.
